title: Word lid van het <mark>fediversum</mark>! zine
title_no_html: Word lid van het fediversum! zine
description: Print deze pagina als een micro-zine (selecteer "geen randen" in jou printer instellingen), knip het uit, vouw het, en deel het met je vrienden!
alt_cover: Vertalingen van het woord fediversum in verschillende talen, herhaald over meerdere lijnen.
alt_email: Logos van verschillende email applicaties, zoals GMail, Outlook, Apple Mail, en andere, geschikt in een cirkel, verbonden met stippellijnen. Een paar emoji enveloppen zijn zichtbaar, alsof ze verzondern worden tussen de mail apps.
alt_social_corporate: Logos of various corporate social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, X, and others, arranged in a circle. There are no connections between them and no messages are being sent.
alt_social_fediverse: Logos of various fediverse social media platforms, including Mastodon, Pixelfed, and others, arranged in a circle, connected with dashed lines. A few emoji envelope are shown as being sent between the platforms.
alt_qr_code: QR code generated for the website JoinTheFediverse.net
alt_instructions: Step-by-step diagram showing how to fold and cut the printed zine: 1. Fold the paper in half horizontally. 2. Fold in half vertically. 3. Fold in half vertically again. 4. Unfold, then fold again horizontally. 5. Cut mid-way across the center. 6. Unfold. A slit should be in the middle of the zine. 7. Fold horizontally again. 8. Push the two ends of the zine toward the center. This will open up the center part of the zine. 9. As you keep pushing the ends of the zine, the zine will take its finished shape of a booklet.
alt_printout: Diagram showing the zine when it's printed out.
qr_invite_label: Paste your invitation link to customize the QR code:
qr_invite_error: Please use a link from invite.jointhefediverse.net.
